docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF ALEJANDRA GARCIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINDA HARRINGTON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY GARCIA, ALEJANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT HARRINGTON, LINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, ALEJANDRA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00(WAIVED) REMARKS: NO ANSWER AT THE TIME OF SERVICE. ONLY TWO ATTEMPTS COULD BE MADE BEFORE SERVE BY DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, ALEJANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT HARRINGTON, LINDA
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HARRINGTON, LINDA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GARCIA, ALEJANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2025 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-21-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: CROSS-COMPLAINANT LINDA HARRINGTON IS PRESENT. CROSS-DEFENDANT ALEJANDRA GARCIA IS PRESENT. CROSS-COMPLAINANT TO ALLOW CROSS-DEFENDANT HAVE ACCESS/TAKE HER BELONGINGS FROM THE BASEMENT AND TO RETURN TO COURT AFTER COMPLIANCE WITH THE ORDER. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2025 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-21-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ALEJANDRA GARCIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINDA HARRINGTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF HAVE ACCESS/TAKE HER BELONGINGS FROM THE BASEMENT AND TO RETURN TO COURT AFTER COMPLIANCE WITH THE ORDER. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF ALEJANDRA GARCIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINDA HARRINGTON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, ALEJANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRINGTON, LINDA $450.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $450.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2025 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HARRINGTON, LINDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GARCIA, ALEJANDRA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
